rationale.fidelity: Keeps realized demand exogenous, orders as advance decisions, supplier capacity and in-set coverage as constraints, and limits the guarantee to the chosen uncertainty set.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly frames the protection-versus-cost trade-off and a nominal or smaller-budget counterfactual, though operational implementation details remain abstract.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly positioning is requested or asserted; this conditional category is not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly treats set calibration as unverified and sharply bounds resilience, service, profit, and out-of-set claims.
rationale.prose_clarity: Precise and well organized but repeats the same calibration and boundary points in multiple sections.
rationale.overall: A faithful robust-optimization framing that squarely exposes conservatism and the in-set guarantee boundary.
